2604.08171.title: OceanMAE: A Foundation Model for Ocean Remote Sensing
2604.08171.paper_summary: Accurate ocean mapping is essential for applications such as bathymetry estimation, seabed characterization, marine litter detection, and ecosystem monitoring. However, ocean remote sensing (RS) remains constrained by limited labeled data and by the reduced transferability of models pre-trained mainly on land-dominated Earth observation imagery. In this paper, we propose OceanMAE, an ocean-specific masked autoencoder that extends standard MAE pre-training by integrating multispectral Sentinel-2 observations with physically meaningful ocean descriptors during self-supervised learning. By incorporating these auxiliary ocean features, OceanMAE is designed to learn more informative and ocean-aware latent representations from large- scale unlabeled data. To transfer these representations to downstream applications, we further employ a modified UNet-based framework for marine segmentation and bathymetry estimation. Pre-trained on the Hydro dataset, OceanMAE is evaluated on MADOS and MARIDA for marine pollutant and debris segmentation, and on MagicBathyNet for bathymetry regression. The experiments show that OceanMAE yields the strongest gains on marine segmentation, while bathymetry benefits are competitive and task-dependent. In addition, an ablation against a standard MAE on MARIDA indicates that incorporating auxiliary ocean descriptors during pre-training improves downstream segmentation quality. These findings highlight the value of physically informed and domain-aligned self-supervised pre- training for ocean RS. Code and weights are publicly available at https://git.tu-berlin.de/joanna.stamer/SSLORS2.
2604.08171.paper_summary_zh: 精確的海洋映射對於如水深估算、海床特徵描述、海洋垃圾檢測和生態系統監測等應用至關重要。<lb/>然而，海洋遙感（RS）仍然受到有限標記數據和主要基於陸地主導的地球觀測影像預訓練模型的轉移性降低的限制。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了OceanMAE，一種專門針對海洋的掩蔽自動編碼器，它通過在自我監督學習過程中整合多光譜的Sentinel-2觀測數據和具有物理意義的海洋描述符，擴展了標準MAE的預訓練。<lb/>通過納入這些輔助的海洋特徵，OceanMAE旨在從大規模未標記數據中學習更具信息性和海洋感知的潛在表示。<lb/>為了將這些表示轉移到下游應用中，我們進一步採用了基於修改的UNet框架進行海洋分割和水深估算。<lb/>OceanMAE在Hydro數據集上進行預訓練，並在MADOS和MARIDA上進行海洋污染物和碎片分割評估，以及在MagicBathyNet上進行水深回歸評估。<lb/>實驗顯示，OceanMAE在海洋分割上獲得了最強的增益，而水深的益處則是具有競爭性且依賴於任務的。<lb/>此外，對MARIDA上標準MAE的消融實驗表明，在預訓練期間納入輔助海洋描述符可改善下游分割質量。<lb/>這些發現突顯了對於海洋遙感，基於物理知識和領域對齊的自我監督預訓練的價值。<lb/>代碼和權重可在https://git.tu-berlin.de/joanna.stamer/SSLORS2上公開獲得。
2604.08171.author: Viola-Joanna Stamer et.al.
2604.08171.authors: Viola-Joanna Stamer, Panagiotis Agrafiotis, Behnood Rasti, Begüm Demir
